titleStmt.title: SII 40.246: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 246. (A.R. No. B. 291 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in the compound of the Sakalēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1074, Phālguṇa ba. 10, Thursday.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Sakalēśvaradēva and also gift of some land by Nūṁkōju, son of Rēvāchārya, a shareholder of the village Māmaṁḍala for the merit of his parents. The above gift was entrusted to Vēmana, son of Chāmanabōya, for supply of ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1074 gunēṁṭṭi phālguṇa bahulā
daśamiya guruvāramuna māmaṁḍalavritti kāṇḍurēvā
cā¨ryya koḍku nūṁkkoju dana tallidaṁḍrulaku dha¨rmmamagu
śrī sakalēśvaradēvarakakhaṁḍavatti dīpaṁbunakiccina go
ṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni gaṁḍūmāreyabōyuni va
samuna cāmanabōyuni koḍku vēmana dana putrānupautrikamā
caṁdrā¨rkkamu dēvaradīpaṁbunaku nityamānēṇḍu nēyavāyaṁgalavāṁḍu
rēvvoju koḍuku nuṁkēnāvēyiku kha 4
nīrinēlamaṟattu 2 māmaṁḍalapaṁḍreṁḍru mē
ṁḍla vaḍlavimānāḍḍimācaṁdrā¨rkkagā niccitimi dīni
naḍapanīvāru paṁcamahāpātakulaguduru
svadattāṁ paradattāṁvā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi
va¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Ī dha¨rmmavuseṟicinavāru paṁcamahāpātakulaguduru
mālyeboyini koḍuku komma kha 1 kete kha 1 Eṟṟiya
boIni kha 1 brammaboyanikha 1 kētabōIni kha 1
marebōyini kha 1 kommana bōyeni kha 1 kētako
ḍuku kēte kha 1
Digital edition of SII 40.246 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
